level_complete.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
level_complete.text: Target's gone. He was never here... Demo's over, marine.

briefing_01.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
briefing_01.text: Listen up, soldier. Biden was spotted three blocks north. Move out — and don't come back without confirmation.

briefing_02.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
briefing_02.text: Intel confirms resistance fighters between here and the target. Engage at will.

deploy.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
deploy.text: Grab a weapon from the armory crates and get moving. This isn't a daycare, marine.

objective_reminder.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
objective_reminder.text: Reminder: the Big Guy is the priority. Everything else is collateral.

resistance_death_01.speaker: Resistance Fighter
resistance_death_01.text: Tell Joe... the deal... still stands...

escaped_01.speaker: Joe Biden
escaped_01.text: You'll have to try harder than that, jack!

joe_radio_01.speaker: Joe Biden
joe_radio_01.text: Here's the deal, folks: I was never even in this sector. No malarkey.

low_health_hint.speaker: Sgt. Dornan
low_health_hint.text: Medical supplies are stashed in the alley, marine. Try not to bleed on them.
